name: Topological Acoustic Knots
description: A nematic orientation field where audio frequencies drive the birth, motion, and annihilation of topological defects. Bass and treble create defects while mids control their mobility. Mouse can pin or generate new singularities.

params.name: Defect Density
params.description: How many defects are created by audio

params.name: Defect Mobility
params.description: How fast defects move and interact

params.name: Defect Pairing
params.description: Tendency for defects to annihilate in pairs

params.name: Mouse Pinning Strength
params.description: How strongly the mouse can pin or create defects
